body_html:
cecelia have david grosof contact them
--- Cecilia Steen cecilia.steen@gmail.com wrote:

JE, could you pls help me out in answering his
below questions?
Cecilia

Hi Cecilia,

Thank you for writing. There are many different
types of computer virus
researchers so I would need to know more about your
project's goals and
direction in order to see if my skills would be of
any value to your
efforts.

As your project is directed towards human viruses,
would you be interested
in
human infectious disease researchers as-well-as
computer virus researchers?

Best regards,
Randy Vaughn
